title: Juncheng Zhang
text: I am a PhD Candidate in Economics at the University of Nottingham Ningbo China and a member of Centre for Decision Research and Experimental Economics (CeDEx) China. I received my Master’s degree from University of Southampton and my Bachelor’s degree from Jilin University, Zhuhai College. My research interests are in experimental and behavioural economics, especially how people’s self-perception shapes decision-making.

title: Juncheng Zhang
text: I am a PhD Candidate in Economics at the University of Nottingham Ningbo China and a member of Centre for Decision Research and Experimental Economics (CeDEx) China. I received my Master’s degree from University of Southampton and my Bachelor’s degree from Jilin University, Zhuhai College. My research interests are in experimental and behavioural economics, especially how people’s self-perception shapes decision-making.

title: Why I Want to Keep Notes
text:
我想把这里当成一个比较轻的空间，用来放一些还没有正式写成论文、也不一定适合放进 CV 的想法。
有些想法可能来自读文章时的一点困惑，有些可能来自教学时学生提出的问题，也可能只是我对行为经济学、实验设计、自我认知和决策问题的一些零散感受。它们未必成熟，但记录下来本身就很有价值。
对我来说，写 notes 的意义不是为了显得“产出很多”，而是给思考留痕。很多研究问题最开始并不是一个完整的模型或实验，而是一句不太确定的问题：为什么人会回避某些有用的信息？为什么有时候保持自信比知道真相更重要？为什么同样的反馈，对不同人会产生完全不同的影响？
这个板块以后就用来保存这些小问题和小观察。它们可以很短，也可以慢慢长成更正式的研究想法。

title: Research
text: My research focuses on behavioural economics and decision theory, with a particular interest in how self-perception influences economic decision-making. I use experimental methods to test theoretical predictions and study individual behaviour.
